news_data.title: FTX Files for Bankruptcy After Liquidity Crisis
news_data.snippet: Crypto exchange collapsed within days after rival Binance pulled out of rescue acquisition deal.

news_data.title: FTX Misused $8B in Customer Funds, Investigation Reveals
news_data.snippet: Customer deposits were secretly funneled to Alameda Research, SBF's proprietary trading firm.

news_data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Found Guilty on All Seven Fraud Counts
news_data.snippet: FTX founder convicted of wire fraud, conspiracy, and money laundering, facing up to 110 years in prison.

news_data.title: FTX Bankruptcy Estate Recovers $7.3B for Creditors
news_data.snippet: New management under John Ray III clawed back assets from insiders, venture investments, and property.

news_data.title: FTX Collapse Triggers Global Crypto Regulatory Crackdown
news_data.snippet: US, EU, and Asian regulators accelerate crypto exchange licensing and proof-of-reserves requirements.

social_data.title: FTX Stole My Life Savings
social_data.snippet: Had $340K on FTX. Withdrawal disabled overnight. I trusted their proof of reserves marketing. Devastated.

social_data.title: SBF Conviction Reaction
social_data.snippet: Justice served but money is gone. The celebrity endorsements and stadium naming deal made people trust a Ponzi.

social_data.title: Not Your Keys Not Your Coins Validated
social_data.snippet: FTX proved the oldest crypto lesson. Self-custody is the only way. Never trust a centralized exchange fully.

review_data.title: FTX Employee Review — Engineering
review_data.snippet: No internal controls, no board oversight, accounting done on QuickBooks. It was chaos disguised as genius.

review_data.title: FTX Employee Review — Operations
review_data.snippet: Bahamas office was a frat house. Decisions made by a small inner circle. HR was nonexistent.
